Description: Maintain a register of all AI systems (SaaS & internal models) used within the organization.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Google Sheets registry updated quarterly via surveys.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Sinaptic.AI / LayerX: Auto-discovery of AI apps visited.

Description: Enforce security configurations on browsers (no pwd saving, HTTPS only, block malicious extensions).
Define and enforce a list of authorized ("Green") and prohibited ("Red") AI services.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Written policy (PDF) + Firewall blocking of top 10 risky sites.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Cloudflare Gateway / Sinaptic: Block access to non-whitelisted domains.

Description: Define data types (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted) prohibited for Public AI.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Data Handling Policy document with examples.
Mapping (ISO / GDPR / AI Act / NIST): ISO 27001 A.5.12; GDPR Art. 32; NIST MAP-3.1

Description: Require Multi-Factor Authentication for all business accounts (Email, Cloud, AI Tools).
Implementation (Free/Manual): Enforce 2FA in Google Workspace/M365 admin panel.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Okta / JumpCloud: Centralized SSO with forced MFA.

Description: Encrypt hard drives on all workstations to protect data if device is lost/stolen.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Intune / Kandji: Enforce encryption compliance remotely.

Description: Legal sign-off from employees confirming they understand AI usage rules.
Implementation (Free/Manual): PDF Policy signed via DocuSign or physical paper.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Vanta / Drata: Automated policy acceptance tracking.

Description: Restrict Admin rights. Regular users should not be Local Admins on their machines.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Create "Standard User" accounts for daily work.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): JumpCloud / Intune: Manage local admin groups.

Description: Ensure OS and Browsers are updated to the latest versions within 14 days of release.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Enable "Auto-Update" on all OS and Browsers.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Automox / Intune: Force updates and reboot if non-compliant.

Description: Basic due diligence check before buying a new AI tool (Terms of Service, Data residency).
Implementation (Free/Manual): Checklist: "Does vendor train on our data? Is data in EU?"
Mapping (ISO / GDPR / AI Act / NIST): ISO 27001 A.5.19; GDPR Art. 28; EU AI Act (Transparency)

Description: Restrict "Anyone with the link" sharing in Google Drive/OneDrive to prevent accidental exposure.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Set Drive default link sharing to "Restricted" or "Organization Only".
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Metasploit / G-Suite Admin: Audit sharing settings.

Description: Enforce PIN/Biometrics and remote wipe capability on mobile phones accessing company data.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Require PIN/FaceID on all work phones.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Intune (MAM) / Jamf: Enforce policies on BYOD devices.

Description: Computers must auto-lock after 5-10 minutes of inactivity.
Implementation (Free/Manual): OS Settings -> Screen Saver -> Wait: 5 min -> On resume, display logon screen.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): GPO / Intune: Force screen lock timeout policy.

Description: Officially assign a person (or role) responsible for AI decisions and risk acceptance.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Update Job Description of CTO/Tech Lead.

Description: Revoke all access (Email, AI tools, SaaS) immediately upon employee termination.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Checklist: "Revoke Email, Slack, GitHub, ChatGPT Team".

Description: Identify unauthorized services via DNS logs (if Sinaptic is not installed everywhere).
Implementation (Free/Manual): Review Router/Firewall logs for high-volume domains.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Cloudflare Gateway / Cisco Umbrella: DNS Analytics.

Description: Notify users (employees/customers) when they are interacting with an AI system.
Implementation (Free/Manual): Disclaimer in email footer / chatbot welcome message.
Implementation (Automated/Tool): Sinaptic.AI: notification when interacting with AI sites.
Mapping (ISO / GDPR / AI Act / NIST): EU AI Act Art. 50 (Transparency); ISO 42001 B.9.2
